task_completion.description: Import the source XML dataset into CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager interface showing the imported facilities 'Northfield Paper Mill' and 'Essex Wire and Cable', or an import success dialog for 'ehs_audit_data.xml'.

task_completion.description: Mark Ammonia, Anhydrous as an Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical inventory or edit screen in CAMEO Data Manager for 'Ammonia, Anhydrous' (at Essex Wire and Cable) showing the 'EHS' or 'Extremely Hazardous Substance' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Mark Hydrofluoric Acid as an Extremely Hazardous Substance (EHS).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical inventory or edit screen in CAMEO Data Manager for 'Hydrofluoric Acid' (at Essex Wire and Cable) showing the 'EHS' or 'Extremely Hazardous Substance' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Ensure Chlorine Dioxide is NOT marked as an EHS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chemical inventory or edit screen in CAMEO Data Manager for 'Chlorine Dioxide' (at Northfield Paper Mill) showing the 'EHS' checkbox UNCHECKED.

task_completion.description: Export the corrected dataset as a Tier II XML file to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, export screen, or success message in CAMEO Data Manager showing the file being saved as 'ehs_corrected.xml' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager GUI to edit the chemical records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager application windows, not a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) editing the XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent used CAMEO Data Manager to export the XML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export process should be visible within the CAMEO Data Manager interface, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to copy/modify the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Based on the EPA EHS List (40 CFR Part 355): Ammonia, Anhydrous (CAS 7664-41-7) and Hydrofluoric Acid (CAS 7664-39-3) are confirmed EHS substances and must have their EHS status set to True. Chlorine Dioxide (CAS 10049-04-4) is NOT on the EPA EHS list (it is OSHA PSM regulated) and must remain EHS=False. The final file must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CAMEO\ehs_corrected.xml.
